title: 4 Managing Cash Locations and Limits in ServiceNow
body_text:
4	Managing Cash Locations and Limits in ServiceNow
4.1	Overview of Managing Cash Locations and Limits
Initially, Central 1 administers the set-up of your financial institution, your daily limits, and locations. Once established, you can manage your own cash locations and currency limits in ServiceNow. Limits are set per location. Users with access to a location can order any combination of Canadian notes, coin, and US notes (at face value). If the value of an order is higher than the daily limit set for that location, the order canГўВҖВҷt be processed.
4.2	Logging in to ServiceNow to Manage Cash Order Locations and Limits
To manage your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs cash order locations and limits
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note:	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңService CatalogueГўВҖВқ
Select
Manage Cash Order Locations
in the Cash Ordering category. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select ГўВҖВңManage Cash Order LocationsГўВҖВқ
4.3	Creating a Cash Order Location
The cash order location must be a branch or ATM address. RBC does not permit the use of any other locations. If your financial institution wants to have cash delivered to a different location (e.g., to a customer), youГўВҖВҷll need to make your own arrangements after the cash order from RBC is delivered to your branch.
To create a cash order location:
Go to the Manage Cash Order Locations page in ServiceNow as described in Section 4.2, Logging in to ServiceNow to Manage Cash Order Locations and Limits.
Select
New Record
.
ГўВ‘
Location Name
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the name of the new location. See Figure 6.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Company
ГўВҖВ“ Your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs name is automatically populated.
ГўВ‘Вў
CSC Site (Cash Services Centre)
ГўВҖВ“ Select the appropriate Cash Services Centre from the drop-down menu.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Address
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the address information.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Settlement Account
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the transit number that will be debited for cash orders (no preceding zero).
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Days in Transit
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the number of days in transit.
Note:	Days in Transit refers to the number of business days it takes once the Armoured Car Carrier (ACC) has picked up the cash parcel from the local Royal Bank Cash Services Centre (CSC) to deliver to the specified location. The ACC must provide the number of days in transit so that Royal Bank can update each locationГўВҖВҷs profile accurately to receive cash orders on time.
ГўВ‘ВҰ
Daily Order Limit
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the Daily Order Limit for this location (no periods, no commas).
ГўВ‘В§
Carrier Name
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the name of your armoured car carrier.
ГўВ‘ВЁ
Carrier Route
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the Carrier Route information that is provided by your armoured car carrier (e.g., ГўВҖВңBR Victoria - Weekdays (08110)ГўВҖВқ or "GW Vancouver - Weekdays (06580)ГўВҖВқ).
ГўВ‘В©
Contact Information
ГўВҖВ“ Provide the contact information of an employee at your financial institution (optionally, you can provide contact information for two people).
ГўВ‘ВӘ
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 6: Example of a New Location Record
Important
:	A second authorization is required for new cash location requests. The second authorization must be an authorized signor at your financial institution.
Select the ticket number to open the ticket and add an authorized signor. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Example of a New Ticket Number
Select the lock icon to unlock the External Watch List and add the authorized signor. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Adding Authorized Signor to Watch List
The authorized signor(s) receives an email notification. They can open the ticket, enter ГўВҖВңRequest approvedГўВҖВқ in the comments field, and resubmit the ticket. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Example of Approval from an Authorized Signor
4.4	Updating a Cash Order Location or Limit
The cash order location must be a branch or ATM address. RBC does not permit the use of any other locations. If your financial institution wants to have cash delivered to a different location (e.g., to a customer), youГўВҖВҷll need to make your own arrangements after the cash order from RBC is delivered to your branch.
To update a cash order location or limit:
Note:	To inactivate a cash location, send an email request to
aftdesk@central1.com
.
Go to the Manage Cash Order Locations page in ServiceNow as described in Section 4.2, Logging in to ServiceNow to Manage Cash Order Locations and Limits.
Select
Update Existing Record
, then select the Cash Order Location you want to update. The current information for that location is displayed. See Figure 10.
Make the changes (e.g., Daily Order Limit, Admin Contact).
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 10: Example of Updating an Existing Location
Important
:	Only one authorization is required for limit change requests. Select the ticket number to open the ticket and add an authorized signor. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Example of a New Ticket Number
Select the lock icon to unlock the External Watch List and add the authorized signor. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Adding Authorized Signor to Watch List
The authorized signor receives an email notification. They can open the ticket, enter ГўВҖВңRequest approvedГўВҖВқ in the comments field, and resubmit the ticket. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: Example of Approval from an Authorized Signor
END
